claim_status: No-claim research-question coverage audit only; this record distinguishes active pre-build crosswalk questions from explicitly deferred program questions but does not answer a research question, accept a decision, approve a task, establish evidence, promote readiness, or support a compatibility, security, accessibility, performance, production, or Chrome-class claim.

deferred_questions.reason: The question remains in the research program but is not a current PB closure dependency.
deferred_questions.owner_route: Research program and engine architecture owner; map to a future engine or performance lane.
deferred_questions.revisit_trigger: Revisit before representation or memory budgets become an accepted implementation contract.

unsupported: Active crosswalk membership does not mean a research question is answered.
Deferred status does not delete or reject a research question.
Deferred status does not approve a future owner, task, requirement, or work package.
This audit does not establish standards conformance or browser compatibility.
This audit does not establish security, accessibility, performance, production, or Chrome-class evidence.
This audit does not promote a PB gate or approve a TASK manifest.
A research report or source manifest remains no-claim until executable evidence and review exist.
Every deferred question must be mapped before it becomes a milestone, implementation task, or support claim.
